name: AKAYASHIKI | あかやしき
short_description: AKAYASHIKI is a game where you must escape from a killer roaming the mansion.
detailed_description:
ABOUT THIS GAME

AKAYASHIKI is a game where you must escape from a killer roaming the mansion.

1) While exploring the mansion, collect various items and escape!
2) If you stumble, read the notes in the mansion to find hints about items.
3) In case of emergency, run to the locker!


STORY

"Hey, have you heard the rumors about the AKAYASHIKI?"
"They say if you go there, you can never come back!"

You are an influencer who enjoys exploring abandoned buildings.
It all started with a comment from a viewer.
What awaits in the AKAYASHIKI...


SYSTEM

・There is no save function
・You can change the volume and language settings
・Only Japanese and English are supported languages


OTHER

You are free to stream and play this game on your channel.
